evals.prompt: 这是我们用户管理模块的接口文档（Markdown 格式），包含登录、注册、获取用户信息、修改密码四个接口。帮我转成框架原生的 YAML spec，落到 `cases/` 目录下。每个接口至少覆盖成功路径和一个关键失败路径。
evals.expected_output: 产出 YAML 格式的 cases 文件，包含多个 case，每个接口有成功和失败路径覆盖，使用结构化 validate 列表而非字符串表达式。
assertions: Writes a YAML file to the cases/ directory
Uses structured validate format (eq/exists/ne) rather than string expression format
Covers both success and at least one failure path per endpoint
Uses concrete example values instead of placeholder tokens like __RANDOM__
Reports the output file path and what was not done (no flow, no execution)

evals.prompt: 附件是一份 OpenAPI 3.0 的 JSON 文件，描述了订单服务的 CRUD 接口。帮我转成可执行 spec，然后再导出一份 Excel 给测试经理看。Excel 要按你们定义的标准列来。
evals.expected_output: 先生成原生 YAML spec，再导出 Excel，Excel 使用标准列定义。
assertions: Generates the native YAML spec first before exporting Excel
Excel output uses the standard COLUMNS defined in _spec_table.py
Does not skip the native spec and only produce Excel
Clearly states which files were written and their paths
Identifies any flow dependencies (e.g. auth) for handoff

evals.prompt: 这几个接口都需要先登录拿 token 才能调。你先帮我把接口文档转成 spec，登录 flow 的事儿后面再说，我现在只要 case 文件。
evals.expected_output: 只产出 case spec，不擅自创建 flow 配置，但在 case 中标注依赖 flow，并在回答中明确交接给 flow-configurator。
assertions: Produces case YAML files without creating project.yaml or flows/*.yaml
Cases reference flow dependencies (e.g. setup with use: flow:xxx or notes about auth)
Explicitly hands off to apitestspec-flow-configurator for the login flow
Does not attempt to execute tests or set up environment variables
Uses concrete example values in request bodies

evals.prompt: 我已经有了一套跑起来的 case，现在想在原来基础上补几个边界场景。这是补充的接口说明，你帮我追加到现有 spec 文件里。
evals.expected_output: 增量追加 case 到现有文件，而非覆盖或重写全部。
assertions: Appends new cases rather than overwriting the entire file
New cases cover the requested boundary scenarios
Preserves existing case IDs and structure
Reports which cases were added and the file path

evals.prompt: 我们项目没有接口文档，只有后端 Java 代码。你帮我把接口都整理出来。
evals.expected_output: 不应由 composer 处理，应识别为源码扫描场景并交接给 surface-scan。
assertions: Does not attempt to generate specs from source code
Identifies the task as endpoint discovery from source code
Hands off to apitestspec-surface-scan

evals.prompt: 帮我把这份 Markdown 接口说明转成 CSV 格式就行，我不需要 YAML。
evals.expected_output: 仍应先产出原生 spec 再导出 CSV，而非直接跳过原生 spec。
assertions: Generates native spec first even when the user only requests CSV
Exports CSV using the standard column format
Explains the native-first approach to the user
Reports both the native spec path and the CSV path
